title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 534.310 - Verdict for complainant — what it shall include
text:
534.310.  Verdict for complainant — what it shall include. — Whenever the verdict of the jury or finding of the judge shall be for the complainant, damages shall be assessed as well for waste and injury committed upon the premises found to have been forcibly or unlawfully detained, as for all rents and profits due and owing up to the time of the rendering of the verdict or finding of the judge, and such verdict or finding shall also state the monthly value of the rents and profits of said premises.
(RSMo 1939 § 2845, A.L. 1945 p. 1089, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2459; 1919 § 3007; 1909 § 7669 
Effective 1-02-79
